action.reasoning: Observation: Data explored - 10,415 training pairs, 1,157 val pairs, 16kHz mono WAVs, 1.7-11.8s duration. Need to build speech enhancement pipeline. Analysis: Pre-trained MetricGAN+ is available and trained on VoiceBank+DEMAND - should give strong PESQ baseline. Decision: Create predict.py using MetricGAN+ first for baseline score, then train custom model for improvement.
